summary: Create a fresh new app baseline and apply branding updates: show the full-color uploaded logo in the top-left header and add a subtle transparent watermark-style scrolling logo background across authenticated/logged-in pages.
architectural_notes: Branding configuration via BRANDING constants (logo src/alt and related styling) used by header and background components.
Support different logo treatments for header vs authenticated background (e.g., header uses full-color asset; background uses watermark styling via CSS opacity/filter or a separate derived asset).
known_issues: Previous build/deploy claims did not correspond to an actual codebase; requires creating a fresh app project before applying branding features.
Logo may not appear if the branding path (/assets/generated/xoroots-logo.dim_300x100.png) does not exist or the asset is not placed/served at that exact location.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Full-color XOROOTS logo on a transparent background, tightly framed for a wide banner (xoroots-logo.dim_300x100.png, 300x100)
- Grayscale/monochrome XOROOTS logo on a transparent background with a soft, watermark look (xoroots-logo-watermark.dim_300x100.png, 300x100)

existing_features.title: Ensure the project rebuild produces a clean, working baseline that compiles and runs with the current app layout/behavior unchanged (Landing page when logged out; Dashboard + Header when logged in).

Implement a transparent, continuously scrolling XOROOTS logo background on authenticated pages only, behind dashboard content, using the same logo asset and without blocking interactions or harming readability.
Create and use a separate subtle transparent watermark-style variant of the XOROOTS logo for the authenticated scrolling background, while keeping the header logo full-color.
Update the authenticated scrolling logo background styling so the watermark remains subtle and readable behind content in both light and dark themes (no interaction blocking).

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a fresh new app baseline project to apply branding changes cleanly
Implement top-left header logo using BRANDING.logo.src and BRANDING.logo.alt
Add authenticated scrolling transparent logo background using branding asset and CSS

Create/verify a clean, working baseline app codebase that builds and runs, keeping the current layout and behavior unchanged, and ensuring authenticated pages render <Header /> and the dashboard as they do now.
Add the uploaded XOROOTS logo as a static frontend asset and use it consistently via the centralized branding constants (BRANDING.logo.src and BRANDING.logo.alt).

Ensure the authenticated app header displays the XOROOTS logo anchored in the top-left on all logged-in pages using the existing <BrandLogo size="small" /> rendering, with consistent spacing across breakpoints.

Implement a transparent, continuously scrolling logo background on authenticated pages only, behind dashboard content, using the same XOROOTS logo asset and without blocking interactions or harming readability.
Add the uploaded XOROOTS logo as a static frontend asset at the exact path referenced by branding constants and ensure it is served correctly: /assets/generated/xoroots-logo.dim_300x100.png.

Ensure the authenticated header displays the XOROOTS logo anchored in the top-left on all logged-in pages using the existing <BrandLogo size="small" /> component, with consistent spacing across breakpoints.
Use full-color logo in the header and a subtle transparent/watermark-style variant for the authenticated scrolling background (via separate asset or styling like opacity/grayscale).

Add the uploaded XOROOTS logo image to the frontend static assets so the full-color logo is served from the exact path referenced by BRANDING.logo.src: `/assets/generated/xoroots-logo.dim_300x100.png`.

projectName: Create fresh baseline app and apply XOROOTS logo branding (header + scrolling authenticated background)
